experiences.title: Freelance - Heycha POS System
description: Designed and developed a full-featured Point of Sale (POS) system for a real retail business, supporting sales transactions, inventory control, order management, shipment tracking, and daily operational workflows.
Built a scalable backend API using Spring Boot (Java 17) and a modern, responsive frontend with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented secure authentication and authorization using JWT and OAuth 2.0, including third-party login with Google.
Developed and optimized internal business processes such as stock reconciliation, order status flows, and role-based access control to improve operational efficiency and data consistency.
Implemented advanced product search and filtering capabilities to speed up sales operations and improve user experience.
Integrated AWS S3 for secure storage and management of product images and internal digital assets.
Implemented multi-currency transaction handling to support operations in both USD and NIO (Córdobas).
Designed internal tools and system validations to reduce human error during sales, inventory updates, and shipment processing.
Provided continuous system maintenance, feature enhancements, and performance optimizations based on real business requirements.
